meaning: adj.患黄疸病的,敌视的,有偏见的
examples: She looked on politicians with a jaundiced eye.
Her bad - jaundiced - color comes and goes.
Her social position jaundiced his view of things.
He also looks back at the arts scene in Miami with a slightly jaundiced eye.
But with an estimated 30, 000 such sites claiming the same, the jaundiced consumer is rightly sceptical.
